entityIds.subResourceRollupRule: Sub-resources (extensions, subnets, databases, firewallrules, NICs, PIPs, AI deployments) are rolled up under their parent ARM resource by ARM ID prefix; they never emit their own row -- see SCHEMA-SPEC Â§ 5.2 / Â§ 11.1.
entityIds.crossEngineVmRule: When NodeLabel == microsoft.compute/virtualmachines AND Categories contains 'device', the same asset emits BOTH an Azure_Profile_CL row AND an Endpoint_Profile_CL row; rows are linked by shared EntityIds -- see SCHEMA-SPEC Â§ 5.3.

hashes.name: ProfileHash
hashes.description: Hash of every phase=profile field plus rule-set hash. collapses the legacy 4-hash model into 2 per ARCHITECTURE.md § 16.

azure._policy: include-only (default-deny). Only paths listed here flow to Properties.collect.azure. New ARM/RP fields are NOT auto-included -- monthly schema-drift detection adds them after review.

exposureGraph._policy: include-only (default-deny). Monthly schema-drift detection adds new MS fields after review.

fields.name: EntityIds
fields.sourcePath: merged from all sources (azure + exposureGraph + derived)

derivation.algorithm: alias of Name (the resource's short name from ARM) -- shared cross-engine asset-name field for consistent reporting / dashboards
alias of AzureResourceId (= ARM resource id, full path) -- shared cross-engine asset-id field for consistent reporting / dashboards
alias of Type (= ARM resource type, e.g. microsoft.compute/virtualmachines) -- shared cross-engine asset-type field for consistent reporting / dashboards
EG NodeId hex (preferred for cross-engine joins to ExposureGraph) -- short opaque GUID, distinct from AzureResourceId which is the full ARM path

fields.name: ManagementGroupId
fields.sourcePath: walked from parent path of subscription

fields.name: ParentMG_Structure
fields.sourcePath: arg-walk: subscription -> management-group ancestors chain (root-first), '/' separated, leaf segment is subscription display name

derivation.algorithm: Walk ARG resourcecontainers (microsoft.management/managementgroups + microsoft.resources/subscriptions) once per run; emit slash-joined display-name path 'Tenant/.../<sub-name>'. Empty when principal can't read MG/sub scopes.

inputs: Azure resource discovered via ARG or EG (presence implies active state); EG lastSeen within $global:SI_ActiveStaleDays when available

fields.name: ExtParentVmId
fields.sourcePath: derived: ARM-id prefix of the extension

fields.name: SubnetParentVnetId
fields.sourcePath: derived: ARM-id prefix of the subnet

fields.name: SqlDbParentServerId
fields.sourcePath: derived: ARM-id prefix of the database

fields.name: LaParameters
fields.sourcePath: arm.workflows.properties.parameters (parameter shape only; values may be redacted)

fields.name: DeplParentAccountId
fields.sourcePath: derived: ARM-id prefix of the deployment

fields.name: SqlFwParentServerId
fields.sourcePath: derived: ARM-id prefix of the firewall rule

derivation.algorithm: Test-SIAzurePubliclyExposed -- walks 14 public-access flags (AllowBlobPublicAccess, *PublicNetworkAccess, EG_*AllowsPublicAccess, PipAddress)
Test-SIAzureOpenAdminPort -- NSG with allow-Internet rule on 22/3389/5985

fields.name: cmdbId
fields.sourcePath: cmdb.id (CMDB row primary key when matched at Reconcile)

derivation.algorithm: Reconcile-stage classification of how the asset was matched to CMDB: rule / identity / orphan / stale-cache / gap-cis
Reconcile-stage match outcome: matched / unmatched / ambiguous

fields.name: MsCriticalityLevel
fields.sourcePath: eg.node.NodeProperties.rawData.criticalityLevel (Microsoft Exposure Mgmt asset criticality verdict). Comparison column only -- Tier sources from CL only.
